style: Photoreal editorial photography for a premium Bangladeshi dairy brand. Soft natural morning light, warm cream and ivory tones, gentle shallow depth of field, calm and honest mood, fine film grain, muted palette leaning to cream (#FFF9F2), deep blue (#153B7A) accents and natural green (#6B9D38). No text, no logos, no watermarks, no harsh studio flash, no garish saturation, not stock-photo lighting.
negative: text, watermark, logo, distorted hands, extra fingers, plastic look, oversaturated, lowres, cartoon, 3d render, busy background

slots.alt: GOOWALI dairy farm in Bangladesh at dawn
slots.prompt: A serene Bangladeshi dairy farm at dawn, lush green pasture with soft morning mist, a few healthy cows grazing in the distance, gentle golden light, a simple farmhouse, calm and pure atmosphere, editorial wide shot.

slots.alt: Healthy cows grazing in a green field at morning
slots.prompt: Healthy brown and white cows grazing peacefully in a lush green Bangladeshi field, soft morning light and dew, shallow depth of field, warm and natural, editorial farm photography.

slots.alt: Fresh milk being collected at the farm
slots.prompt: Close up of fresh creamy milk being poured into a clean steel pail at a farm in soft morning light, hands of a farmer, authentic and hygienic, warm cream tones, shallow depth of field.

slots.alt: A warm family breakfast with fresh milk
slots.prompt: A bright warm breakfast table set with glasses of fresh milk, fresh bread and fruit, two adults sharing a calm morning moment, soft natural window light, cream and white tones, genuine candid editorial lifestyle photography.

slots.alt: Pure milk poured into a glass
slots.prompt: A clear glass being filled with pure white milk, a gentle splash and droplets, clean cream background, soft directional morning light, premium product photography, fresh and pure.

A clear glass milk bottle with a gold foil cap full of fresh white milk, beside a glass of milk, on a cream surface with a few green leaves, soft morning light, premium minimal product photography, condensation on the glass.

A warm, dignified portrait of a middle aged Bangladeshi dairy farmer and entrepreneur standing in a green field at morning, gentle confident smile, soft natural light, honest and trustworthy, editorial portrait, shallow depth of field.
A soft natural portrait of a happy young Bangladeshi mother in a bright kitchen, warm candid smile, gentle window light, cream tones, editorial lifestyle, shallow depth of field.
A relaxed natural portrait of a Bangladeshi man in his thirties at home in the morning holding a glass of milk, warm gentle smile, soft light, cream tones, editorial lifestyle.
A natural portrait of a Bangladeshi female pastry chef in a clean bright kitchen, warm professional smile, soft daylight, cream and white tones, editorial lifestyle, shallow depth of field.

slots.alt: A glass of fresh milk in warm morning light
slots.prompt: A tall glass of fresh milk on a bright breakfast table with soft morning light, a hand reaching for it, warm cream tones, candid and pure, editorial lifestyle photography.

slots.alt: Two glasses of milk side by side
slots.prompt: Two clear glasses of milk side by side on a cream surface in soft morning light, minimal and clean, premium editorial still life, gentle shadows.

slots.prompt: Early misty morning at a Bangladeshi dairy farm, golden light through trees, a cow and a farmer silhouette, peaceful and atmospheric, editorial documentary photography.
